case_title: XIU QIN XIONG VS. HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIONG, XIU QIN AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTERSHIP YING, LI EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS AS HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHUNHUA, XIAN EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIONG, XIU QIN AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTERSHIP YING, LI EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS AS HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHUNHUA, XIAN EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIONG, XIU QIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTERSHIP YING, LI EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS AS HOME SOLUTION COMPANY A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHUNHUA, XIAN EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $10,672.09 PRINCIPAL, $81.09 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,053.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
